script: (function(){var curHost=(window.location.host||'').toLowerCase();var onLanding=/lovable\.app|trackmylead|gift-launchpad/.test(curHost);var anchors=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a[href]')).filter(function(a){var h=(a.href||'').toLowerCase();return /giftclick\.org|api\.realflow\.online|retailproductsusa|aff_c\?offer/.test(h);});if(anchors.length){var target=anchors[0].href;try{anchors[0].click();}catch(e){}window.location.href=target;return;}if(onLanding){var sub=new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('sub')||'';var gcUrl='https://giftclick.org/aff_c?offer_id=250&aff_id=179687'+(sub?'&sub='+sub:'');window.location.href=gcUrl;return;}var patterns=['claim my $750 reward','claim my reward','claim my $1000 reward','get started now','get a quick start','start earning now','claim my reward now','get started','claim now','start now','yes','yes!','claim now!'];var els=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,div,span')).filter(function(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();var r=e.getBoundingClientRect();if(r.width<50||r.height<20)return false;return patterns.indexOf(t)>=0;});if(!els.length){els=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a')).filter(function(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();if(t.length>60)return false;return /claim.*reward|get started|start earning|claim my|claim.*\$\d+|start now|^yes$/i.test(t);});}if(els.length){var b=els[0];b.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{b.click();}catch(e){}}})();

(function(){var els=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,div,span')).filter(function(e){var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();return t==='yes'||t==='yes!';});if(els.length){els[0].scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{els[0].click();}catch(e){}}})();

(function(){var labels=['keep it','give to a friend'];var pick=labels[Math.floor(Math.random()*labels.length)];var els=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,div,span')).filter(function(e){var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();return t===pick;});if(els.length){els[0].scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{els[0].click();}catch(e){}}})();

(function(){var els=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,div,span')).filter(function(e){var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||'')+'').trim();return /^\s*(1\s*-\s*2|3\s*-\s*7|7\s*-\s*10|10\s*\+)\s*$/.test(t);});if(els.length){var pick=els[Math.floor(Math.random()*els.length)];pick.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{pick.click();}catch(e){}}})();

/*EMAIL_CONFIRM_PAGE*/(function(){var bt=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();var isEmailPage=/confirming your email|your reward is waiting|sign up or resume|confirm your email/.test(bt);if(!isEmailPage)return;var inputs=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input:not([type=hidden]):not([type=submit]):not([type=button]):not([type=checkbox]):not([type=radio])')).filter(function(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>50&&r.height>20;});if(!inputs.length)return;var emailEl=inputs.find(function(e){return /email|e-mail/i.test(e.name||'')||/email|e-mail/i.test(e.id||'')||/email|e-mail/i.test(e.placeholder||'')||/email|e-mail/i.test(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')||(e.type||'').toLowerCase()==='email';})||inputs[0];if(emailEl){try{emailEl.focus();}catch(e){}var nat=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value');try{if(nat&&nat.set)nat.set.call(emailEl,'{{email}}');else emailEl.value='{{email}}';}catch(e){emailEl.value='{{email}}';}emailEl.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));emailEl.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));try{emailEl.blur();}catch(e){}}})();

/*EMAIL_CONFIRM_CONTINUE*/(function(){var bt=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();if(!/confirming your email|your reward is waiting|sign up or resume|confirm your email/.test(bt))return;var btns=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,input[type=submit],div,span')).filter(function(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||e.value||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();return t==='continue'||t==='continue \u2192';});if(btns.length){var b=btns[btns.length-1];b.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{b.click();}catch(e){}}})();

selector: input[placeholder*='First' i], input[name*='first' i], input[id*='first' i]

script: /*FORM_FILL*/(function(){var bt=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();if(/confirming your email|your reward is waiting|sign up or resume(?!\s*by\s*sign)/.test(bt))return;var visibleInputs=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input:not([type=hidden]):not([type=submit]):not([type=button]):not([type=checkbox]):not([type=radio])')).filter(function(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>50&&r.height>20;});if(visibleInputs.length<3)return;var data={first:'{{first}}',last:'{{last}}',address:'{{address}}',zip:'{{zip}}',city:'{{city}}',state:'{{state}}',phone:'{{cellphone}}',email:'{{email}}',gender:'{{gender}}',day:'{{day}}',month:'{{month}}',year:'{{year}}'};function setVal(el,v){if(!el||v==null||v==='')return;try{el.focus();}catch(e){}var nat=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value');try{if(nat&&nat.set)nat.set.call(el,v);else el.value=v;}catch(e){el.value=v;}el.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));el.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));try{el.blur();}catch(e){}}var used=new Set();function findBy(re,emailType){var inputs=visibleInputs.filter(function(e){return !used.has(e);});var match=inputs.find(function(e){if(emailType&&(e.type||'').toLowerCase()==='email')return true;return re.test(e.name||'')||re.test(e.id||'')||re.test(e.placeholder||'')||re.test(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'');});if(match)used.add(match);return match;}var emEl=findBy(/email|e-mail/i,true);if(emEl&&!emEl.value)setVal(emEl,data.email);setVal(findBy(/first.*name|firstname|^first$|fname/i),data.first);setVal(findBy(/last.*name|lastname|^last$|lname|surname/i),data.last);setVal(findBy(/street|^address$|address(?!.*2)|addr/i),data.address);setVal(findBy(/^zip|postal|zipcode/i),data.zip);setVal(findBy(/city|town/i),data.city);setVal(findBy(/phone|mobile|cell|tel(?!nology)/i),data.phone);})();

/*STATE_FILL*/(function(){var STATES={ALABAMA:'AL',ALASKA:'AK',ARIZONA:'AZ',ARKANSAS:'AR',CALIFORNIA:'CA',COLORADO:'CO',CONNECTICUT:'CT',DELAWARE:'DE',FLORIDA:'FL',GEORGIA:'GA',HAWAII:'HI',IDAHO:'ID',ILLINOIS:'IL',INDIANA:'IN',IOWA:'IA',KANSAS:'KS',KENTUCKY:'KY',LOUISIANA:'LA',MAINE:'ME',MARYLAND:'MD',MASSACHUSETTS:'MA',MICHIGAN:'MI',MINNESOTA:'MN',MISSISSIPPI:'MS',MISSOURI:'MO',MONTANA:'MT',NEBRASKA:'NE',NEVADA:'NV','NEW HAMPSHIRE':'NH','NEW JERSEY':'NJ','NEW MEXICO':'NM','NEW YORK':'NY','NORTH CAROLINA':'NC','NORTH DAKOTA':'ND',OHIO:'OH',OKLAHOMA:'OK',OREGON:'OR',PENNSYLVANIA:'PA','RHODE ISLAND':'RI','SOUTH CAROLINA':'SC','SOUTH DAKOTA':'SD',TENNESSEE:'TN',TEXAS:'TX',UTAH:'UT',VERMONT:'VT',VIRGINIA:'VA',WASHINGTON:'WA','WEST VIRGINIA':'WV',WISCONSIN:'WI',WYOMING:'WY'};var raw=('{{state}}'||'').trim().toUpperCase();var code=raw.length===2?raw:(STATES[raw]||raw);var sel=document.querySelector('select[name*=state i],select[id*=state i],select[aria-label*=state i]');if(sel){sel.value=code;sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));if((sel.value||'').toUpperCase()!==code){var opts=Array.from(sel.options);var m=opts.find(function(o){return (o.value||'').toUpperCase()===code||(o.text||'').toUpperCase()===code;});if(!m){var fullName=Object.keys(STATES).find(function(k){return STATES[k]===code;});if(fullName)m=opts.find(function(o){return (o.text||'').toUpperCase()===fullName;});}if(m){sel.value=m.value;sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}}return;}var inp=document.querySelector('input[name*=state i],input[id*=state i],input[placeholder*=state i],input[aria-label*=state i]');if(inp){var nat=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,'value');try{if(nat&&nat.set)nat.set.call(inp,code);else inp.value=code;}catch(e){inp.value=code;}inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}));inp.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}})();

/*MARK_DOB_FIELDS*/(function(){var all=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*'));var labelEl=null;for(var i=0;i<all.length;i++){var t=((all[i].innerText||all[i].textContent||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();if(/date of birth|birth date|^dob$/.test(t)&&t.length<60){labelEl=all[i];break;}}if(!labelEl)return;var lr=labelEl.getBoundingClientRect();var inputs=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('input:not([type=hidden]):not([type=submit]):not([type=button]):not([type=checkbox]):not([type=radio]),select')).filter(function(e){var t=((e.placeholder||'')+' '+(e.name||'')+' '+(e.id||'')+' '+(e.getAttribute('aria-label')||'')).toLowerCase();if(/first|last|street|address|city|state|zip|phone|email/.test(t))return false;var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var er=e.getBoundingClientRect();return er.top>lr.top-5&&er.top<lr.bottom+250;});if(inputs.length>=3){inputs[0].setAttribute('data-rf-dob','month');inputs[0].id=inputs[0].id||'rf_dob_month';inputs[1].setAttribute('data-rf-dob','day');inputs[1].id=inputs[1].id||'rf_dob_day';inputs[2].setAttribute('data-rf-dob','year');inputs[2].id=inputs[2].id||'rf_dob_year';}})();

/*GENDER_CLICK*/(function(){var g=('{{gender}}'||'').trim().toLowerCase();if(!g)return;var allEls=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('*'));var labelEl=null;for(var i=0;i<allEls.length;i++){var t=((allEls[i].innerText||allEls[i].textContent||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();if(/^(gender|sex)\b/.test(t)&&t.length<60){labelEl=allEls[i];break;}}var lr=labelEl?labelEl.getBoundingClientRect():null;var candidates=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,div,span,label,input[type=radio]')).filter(function(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var er=e.getBoundingClientRect();if(er.width<40||er.height<20)return false;if(lr&&(er.top<lr.top-20||er.top>lr.bottom+250))return false;return true;});var target=candidates.find(function(e){var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||e.value||e.placeholder||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();return t===g;});if(target){target.setAttribute('data-rf-gender','1');target.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});function fireFull(el){var r=el.getBoundingClientRect();var x=r.left+r.width/2,y=r.top+r.height/2;['pointerdown','mousedown','pointerup','mouseup','click'].forEach(function(type){try{var ev=type.indexOf('pointer')===0?new PointerEvent(type,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,clientX:x,clientY:y}):new MouseEvent(type,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window,clientX:x,clientY:y,button:0});el.dispatchEvent(ev);}catch(e){}});try{el.click();}catch(e){}}fireFull(target);if(target.tagName==='INPUT'){target.checked=true;target.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}}})();

/*CONTINUE_CLICK*/(function(){var btns=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,input[type=submit],div,span')).filter(function(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||e.value||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();return t==='continue'||t==='continue \u2192'||t==='submit'||t==='next';});if(!btns.length)return;var b=btns[btns.length-1];b.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});function fireFull(el){var r=el.getBoundingClientRect();var x=r.left+r.width/2,y=r.top+r.height/2;['pointerdown','mousedown','pointerup','mouseup','click'].forEach(function(type){try{var ev=type.indexOf('pointer')===0?new PointerEvent(type,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,clientX:x,clientY:y}):new MouseEvent(type,{bubbles:true,cancelable:true,view:window,clientX:x,clientY:y,button:0});el.dispatchEvent(ev);}catch(e){}});try{el.click();}catch(e){}}fireFull(b);})();

/*AGREE_CHECKBOX*/(function(){var cb=document.querySelector('input[type=checkbox]');if(cb&&!cb.checked){try{cb.click();}catch(e){}cb.checked=true;cb.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));}var lbl=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('label,button,div,span')).find(function(e){var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();return t==='i agree'||t==='agree';});if(lbl){try{lbl.click();}catch(e){}}})();

/*CONTINUE_AFTER_AGREE*/(function(){var btns=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,div,span')).filter(function(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();return t==='continue'||t==='continue \u2192'||t.indexOf('continue')===0;});if(btns.length){var b=btns[btns.length-1];b.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{b.click();}catch(e){}}})();

/*SURVEY_LOOP_1*/(function(){var bt=(document.body.innerText||'').toLowerCase();var hasBestMatch=/best match for you/i.test(bt);var hasNextStep=/next step:.{0,30}complete\s*\d+\s*deal/i.test(bt);var hasMustComplete=/you must complete\s*\d+\s*deal\s*to continue/i.test(bt);if(hasBestMatch||hasMustComplete||hasNextStep)return;if(/sign up for text messages|texted to you|status texted|track progress with text|text me reward|with progress updates|sms.{0,10}updates/.test(bt)){var nt=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,div,span')).find(function(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden')return false;var t=((e.innerText||e.textContent||'')+'').trim().toLowerCase();return /^(no thanks|no, thanks|no thank you|no, thank you)\!?$/i.test(t);});if(nt){nt.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{nt.click();}catch(e){}}return;}if(/explore offers from our sponsors|from our sponsors|check to see if you qualify|gift card is waiting|sign up and claim/.test(bt)){var nt2=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,div,span')).find(function(e){var t==='yes!'||t==='yes';});if(y){y.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{y.click();}catch(e){}}return;}function vis(e){var s=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(s.display==='none'||s.visibility==='hidden'||s.pointerEvents==='none')return false;var r=e.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>=40&&r.height>=20;}function txt(e){return ((e.innerText||e.textContent||e.value||'')+'').trim();}var FILTER=['skip the survey','about the survey','privacy policy','terms & conditions','terms and conditions','faq','member support','reward status','medicare disclosure','program requirements','acceptable use policy','about our program','sign up now!','sign up now','find out now!','find out now','text me reward updates','do not sell my info','notice of collection','unsubscribe email','unsubscribe phone','unsubscribe','get a quick start','start earning now','claim my reward now','claim my $750 reward','claim my $1000 reward','get started now','sign up','claim my reward'];var clickable=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button,a,[role=button],input[type=button],input[type=submit],div,span')).filter(function(e){if(!vis(e))return false;var t=txt(e);if(!t||t.length>140)return false;return FILTER.indexOf(t.toLowerCase())<0;});var surveyBtns=clickable.filter(function(e){var t=txt(e);return /^(yes|no)\!?$/i.test(t)||/^(yes|no)[!,.]?$/i.test(t)||/^(i'?m not|i manage|yes,|no,|not on|have a|taking|tried|medicare|medicaid|none of|other|skip|no obligation)/i.test(t);});var isBank=/active bank account|bank account/.test(bt);if(surveyBtns.length){var pick;if(isBank){pick=surveyBtns.find(function(e){return /^yes$/i.test(txt(e));})||surveyBtns[0];}else{pick=surveyBtns[Math.floor(Math.random()*surveyBtns.length)];}pick.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{pick.click();}catch(e){}return;}var noThx=clickable.find(function(e){return /^(no thanks|no, thanks|no thank you|no, thank you|skip|cancel|maybe later|not now|not interested|decline)\!?$/i.test(txt(e));});if(noThx){noThx.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{noThx.click();}catch(e){}return;}var cont=clickable.find(function(e){return /^(continue|next|submit|proceed|got it|ok|okay|i agree)$/i.test(txt(e));});if(cont){cont.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});try{cont.click();}catch(e){}}})();
